theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (X:=X) A → Topology.P3 (X:=X) A := by
  intro hP2
  intro x hx
  have hx' : x ∈ Set.interior (Set.closure (Set.interior A)) := hP2 hx
  have hsubset :
      Set.interior (Set.closure (Set.interior A)) ⊆
        Set.interior (Set.closure A) :=
    Set.interior_mono (Set.closure_mono (Set.interior_subset (s:=A)))
  exact hsubset hx'

theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P3 A := by
  intro h
  have h_subset : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A :=
    closure_mono (interior_subset : interior A ⊆ A)
  have h_int : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    interior_mono h_subset
  exact Set.Subset.trans h h_int
